notes: SpectralCC/SCC-Dhillon/FNMF/NBVD/DiMergeCo+SCC run on idle machine. PNMTF ran under contention (3 parallel NMF processes). ONM3F/ONMTF killed after 60+ min under contention; estimated ~1000-1400s on idle machine based on NBVD baseline.

paper_table_notes.values_needing_update: All entries with \todo{} markers on line 842 need updating. The Python baselines (NBVD=1024.8s, PNMTF~1384s, ONM3F/ONMTF~1000-1400s) are much slower than the old values (298-498s) because the old values were from different hardware or different iteration counts. The fast methods (SCC=0.2s, FNMF=1.1s) are similar to old. DiMergeCo-SCC with t_p=10 is 13.9s. Note: the paper table uses t_p=30 and the Rust implementation, so the Python DiMergeCo time is not directly comparable.
